news.headline: Prince Harry Is Sued for Libel by a Charity He Founded
news.summary: Sentebale filed a defamation lawsuit against the Duke of Sussex, who resigned as patron last year after a clash between the board of trustees and the board’s chair.

news.headline: Trump’s tariff powers tested again as judges question ‘deficit’ justification

news.headline: This Week in DOW: Iran Ceasefire, Daring Rescue, Honoring Gold Star Spouses
news.summary: This week, the U.S. announced a two-week ceasefire with Iran, as Secretary of War Pete Hegseth hailed the success of Operation Epic Fury in dismantling one of the world's largest militaries, and the War Department observed Gold Star Spouses Day.
